name: Southern Rock Highway
description: Classic southern rock for the long haul. Lynyrd Skynyrd Allman Brothers Marshall Tucker and more.

name: Late Night Haul
description: Blues and slow jams for those midnight to dawn runs. BB King Albert King and the greats.

name: Sunday Gospel Drive
description: Gospel favorites for Sunday morning drives. Aretha Mahalia Jackson and the old hymns.

name: 90s Country Gold
description: The best of 90s country. George Strait Alan Jackson Garth Brooks and the classics.

name: Janelle's Mix
description: Songs my daughter keeps telling me to listen to. She's usually right.

name: Morning Warmup
description: Easy-going classic rock to start the day right. Tom Petty Eagles and good vibes.
